bk==73179 then p=i+4 u=(p<=h)and 5 or(h-i+1)if u==0 then do bh=true break end end bg[1]=bi[73179+89447]or bj(52845,73179+89447)bl,bk=86659,86659 else bl,bk=bg[1],bg[1]end end else if bk~=52845 then be=ba%256 bf=d(bb,bc,bd,be)if u<5 then bf=b(bf,1,u-1)end g[j]=bf j=j+1 i=i+5 bg[4]=bi[-14404+220518]or bj(-20970,-14404+220518)bk=-17209 else v,w,x,y,z=c(f,i,p)w=w or 117 x=x or 117 then o=l[3]else return e(g)end end until o==-23327 end q[30]=r[-34354+65207]or s(-42378,-34354+65207)t=48501 end else if t==-31427 then t=q[29]else t=q[27]end end end end end until t==-38694 end)(math.floor,string.sub,string.byte,string.char,table.concat,(load or loadstring))
